# Myron Melekson

> Founder & CEO of Mpower Sourcing (AI-enhanced staffing & managed services) and Mpower Agents (AI automation platform). Builder, fractional leader, and tech-community organizer based in Aventura, South Florida.

## About
- 20 years building companies, teams, products, and communities
- MBA from Technion Tel Aviv, BS from Purdue University, Behavioral Economics certificate from Yale School of Management
- Grew up in Glenview, Illinois; based in Aventura, Florida
- Husband, father of two boys, dog owner; deeply involved in civic life and public safety

## Companies (active)
- [Mpower Sourcing](https://mpowersourcing.com) — AI-enhanced staffing and managed services. Skilled offshore professionals in the Philippines, Colombia, and South Africa running AI agents for growing US businesses. Typical engagement: $10–$15/hr; ~90% retention rate vs. ~50% industry average.
- [Mpower Agents](https://mpoweragents.ai) — Virtual assistants, automation, and agentic AI for business operations. The AI-powered arm of the Mpower ecosystem.

## Partnerships & Engagements
- IntelePeer Resale Partnership — AI-powered communications and collections for enterprise clients
- Mobicode (UK) — strategic partnership on cross-border business development and US market entry
- Past fractional / consulting roles: WeDry USA (COO), House Mortgage (Fractional COO), Outsta (Fractional Leadership), DesignedVR (Fractional Leadership), HMS Entertainment (Consulting)
- Closed by design: Magen Construction (2025), Q-IT (Israel-based automated scheduling startup, $150K raised, closed 2017)

## Community Initiatives (Aventura, FL)
- Aventura Tech Ecosystem — building a civic tech hub for founders, students, and local leaders
- Aventura Marketing Council / Chamber of Commerce — active member, expanding the local tech council
- Hack Aventura (May 2026) — two back-to-back one-day high-school hackathons at Don Sofer High School, free and community-funded; students build full AI-powered products in a single day
- NPI Advantage (Hollywood/Davie Powerhouse chapter) — referral networking
- Primetime Founders Group (Aventura) — high-level referral networking
- Pro Business Referrals — referral-driven networking
- Russian-Speaking American Chamber of South Florida (RAC) — member
